basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: CA/ICWA/CS, Post Graduate degree + 5 years relevant experience, Graduate degree + 8 years relevant experience
qualification.details: CA/ICWA/CS Post Graduate degree + 5 years of relevant experience at an appropriate level Graduate degree + 8 years of relevant experience at an appropriate level

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Deputy Project Manager post at IIT Kanpur is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Deputy Project Manager position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a CA/ICWA/CS degree, or a Post Graduate degree with 5 years of relevant experience, or a Graduate degree with 8 years of relevant experience at an appropriate level.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Deputy Project Manager position will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 23,000 to Rs. 59,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Deputy Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Project Manager role involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job opening?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Deputy Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Deputy Project Manager recruitment at IIT Kanpur is P.Rect./R&D/2026/132.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for the Deputy Project Manager recruitment at IIT Kanpur is strictly online. Offline applications will not be considered.
